home.tagline: Paste URLs, get a clean shareable page. No signup needed.
home.textareaPlaceholder:
Paste your links here — one per line, or just a block of text with URLs mixed in...

https://example.com
https://github.com/cool-project
https://dev.to/interesting-article
home.addLater: You can also add links later
home.unlockHint: Unlock with the passphrase to create a list.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Drop in URLs, or paste academic citations in [Author Year] format — we handle both.
howItWorks.step2Desc: URLs are scraped for title and image. Paper references show authors, year, and venue.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Copy your list's short URL and send it to anyone. They'll see a clean, searchable page.

home.footer: Linkarium — open source link list sharing

listView.footer: Create your own list with Linkarium

listHeader.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{title}" and all its links. This action cannot be undone.

addLinks.textareaPlaceholder:
Paste URLs or citations — one per line
[Cushman 2006] Penni Cushman, _Title_, Journal, 2006: https://...
addLinks.citationsDetected: {count, plural, =1 {1 citation detected} other {# citations detected}}
addLinks.noCitationsRecognised: No citations recognised — check the format
addLinks.invalidDoi: Doesn't look like a valid DOI. Example: 10.1145/3290605.3300756
addLinks.doiNotFound: DOI not found. You can still fill in the fields manually.

emptyState.title: No links yet
emptyState.description: Click "Add links" above to start building your list. Paste individual URLs or a whole block of text — we'll find and scrape the links for you.
